metadata.districtModel: five sections; five district slots per section; D13 is the seat of power

cityDNA.coreFantasy: A East Asian (Japanese) city where Jade Dragon Moon-Gate of the Eastern River, Lock House Beacon, Moon Gate Arches Sovereign Registry Court, and the five-section district spine turn local identity into functional civic space.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Qinyue should feel immediately identifiable through exact landmarks and materials, not through generic fantasy-city shorthand.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Qinyue organizes power through Moon Gate Arches Sovereign Registry Court, public response through Lock House Beacon, civic memory through Jade Dragon Moon-Gate of the Eastern River, and daily life through S1 Canal / Riverworks Civic Hall, S2 Granary / Food Market Civic Hall, S3 Records / Archives Hall, S4 Medical / Healing Civic Hall, S5 Artisan Guilds Civic Hall.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Stone, Timber, Iron, Porcelain Tile, Red Lacquer, Riverside, Floodplain, Canal Basin, Civic Blue Illumination, Oath Seals, Ritual Geometry, and exact anchors including Moon Gate Arches Sovereign Registry Court, Lock House Beacon, Jade Dragon Moon-Gate of the Eastern River, Guildhall, Grain Hall, Healing Hall, Canal / Riverworks Civic Hall, Canal Reflections Monument, Waterwheel Court Nook, Granary / Food Market Civic Hall.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: A East Asian (Japanese) civic culture where architecture, public obligations, roads, landmark approaches, and everyday work must all read as part of the same civilization.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: The city symbol system is built from exact names and visible functions: Jade Dragon Moon-Gate of the Eastern River, Lock House Beacon, Moon Gate Arches Sovereign Registry Court, and section anchors such as Canal / Riverworks Civic Hall, Granary / Food Market Civic Hall, Records / Archives Hall, Medical / Healing Civic Hall, Artisan Guilds Civic Hall.

canonLocks: Qinyue uses city code QNY.
The Wonder is Jade Dragon Moon-Gate of the Eastern River.
The Beacon is Lock House Beacon.
The Seat of Power is Moon Gate Arches Sovereign Registry Court and occupies District 13.
The city uses five sections with five tactical district slots per section.
The source-backed section spine is: S1 Canal / Riverworks Civic Hall, S2 Granary / Food Market Civic Hall, S3 Records / Archives Hall, S4 Medical / Healing Civic Hall, S5 Artisan Guilds Civic Hall.

rejectedReads: Do not treat Qinyue as a generic fantasy settlement with renamed landmarks.
Do not collapse the five-section board into a single mood or single district.
Do not replace exact anchor names with generic summaries.
Do not invent missing street-section landmarks when a street source is absent.
cautionFlags: Keep every named Wonder, Beacon, Seat, section civic hall, major landmark, monument, and minor nook exact when present in sidecars.
If an image appears to deviate from a sidecar, preserve the exact name but avoid overclaiming visual details not supported by the source package.
Every district asset should remain usable for narrative scenes, tactical board dioramas, and city map backgrounds.

streets.dayCycle: Day scenes emphasize errands, trade, records, repairs, rituals, food, and section-level movement.

housing.wealthy: Prestige housing clusters near Moon Gate Arches Sovereign Registry Court, high terraces, or landmark-facing routes, using the best source-backed materials and controlled views of civic space.
